meta.title: Veloadout — Bikepacking Gear Volume Calculator
meta.description: Calculate the total volume of your bikepacking gear and get bag recommendations.

hero.title: Know your load before you go
hero.subtitle: Add your gear, we calculate the volume. Instantly know which bags you need.

search.placeholder: E.g. Thermarest NeoAir XLite, Ortlieb Seat-Pack 16L...
search.search_hint: Search for specific products — AI finds exact packed volumes from manufacturer specs.
search.not_found: Could not find volume data for this item.

presets.title: Quick add presets
presets.subtitle: Typical volumes for common gear — check to add instantly

list.title: Your gear list
list.empty: Add your first item above or use the presets.

bags.title: Bag recommendation
bags.subtitle: Based on your total, here's how to distribute across your setup.

footer.text: Volume data is crowd-sourced and AI-assisted. Always verify critical gear specs.

errors.load_failed: Could not load your list. Please refresh.
errors.save_failed: Could not save your list. Please try again.

cookies.title: Cookies & privacy
cookies.description: We use only essential cookies for authentication. No tracking, no ads.

auth.login_subtitle: Enter your email — we send a magic link, no password needed.
auth.magic_link_sent: We sent a sign-in link to
auth.sign_in_to_save: Sign in to save your list
